title: <div>When you arrive at the apartment building, don’t turn into the loop; instea
content:
When you arrive at the apartment building, don’t turn into the loop; instead, park by the entrance to the building garage.

You’ll notice several shopping carts. Pick one up and load the groceries.

Ring the bell for deliveries right next to the garage doors. Maintenance will grant you access to the garage.

Head to the elevator lobby through a door on your left. Take the elevator to the second floor and bear left.

My apartment is 2EE, the last door on the left at the end of the hall.
